benefits.description: 500mcg daily makes you feel snappy; 1-2mg provides better focus and quicker recall; 5mg gives ADHD autistic-level intense focus
High dose semax helped fix a nervous system issue

protocol_notes: Uses normal (non-NA) semax subcutaneously. Has used 500mcg daily as baseline and 5mg when needing intense focus. Running for 6 weeks with no tolerance buildup and no side effects. Has a friend running the same protocol with no issues either. Confirmed subcutaneous route in response to a question.
